Obsidian throne room gleaming with violet bioluminescent crystals suspended from vaulted ceiling, dark reflections multiplying endlessly.
Spider-silk workshop where giant looms weave glowing ethereal thread, artisans coaxing luminous strands from enchanted spinnerets.
Towering mushroom forest with caps broad as houses, phosphorescent spores drifting through humid subterranean air.
Cavern bazaar alive with enchanted lantern-light, merchants hawking poisons, spell-scrolls, and still-beating hearts.
Crystalline shore of lightless lake, blind albino fish surfacing near formations that chime with dripping water.
Poison garden grotto cultivating luminous deathcap fungi, nightshade vines, and flowers weeping paralytic nectar.
Assassin training hall where shadow-magic obstacles shift constantly, blades emerging from darkness without warning.
Spider goddess temple draped in consecrated webs, altar stained with offerings, eight-eyed idol watching hungrily.
Stone bridge spanning bottomless chasm, stalactites dripping acid overhead, distant screams echoing from depths below.
Library carved into living rock, ancient scrolls emanating preservation magic's soft amber glow.
Volcanic forge chamber where smiths hammer darksteel, lava channels providing hellish red illumination.
Balcony overlooking vast undercity of needle-spired towers, countless windows glowing with faerie fire.
Slave pens hewn from rough stone, chains rattling, torches smoking with greasy flame.
Alchemical laboratory in sealed chamber, bubbling retorts casting eerie green phosphorescence across stone workbenches.
Noble house atrium with central fountain of liquid mercury, walls inlaid with luminescent gemstone mosaics.
War-beast kennels where riding spiders cluster in darkness, eyes reflecting dim fungal light.
Torture chamber carved deep in bedrock, implements gleaming in light of slowly dying magical flames.
Underground river dock where boats carved from giant mushroom caps await, bioluminescent algae illuminating water.
Council chamber with obsidian table, each matriarch's seat marked by hovering orbs of colored light.
Fungus brewery where fermentation vats bubble, glowing yeast cultures producing intoxicating luminescence.
Meditation grotto for shadow-dancers, absolute darkness broken only by practitioner's conjured umbral forms.
Arena pit surrounded by tiers of seats, combatants fighting under harsh white witchlight.
Royal bedchamber hung with spider-silk curtains, enchanted gems in ceiling mimicking distant stars.
Secret passage network lit intermittently by patches of phosphorescent lichen, spy-holes overlooking noble chambers.
Necromantic sanctum where undead servants stand motionless, purple death-magic flickering across preserved corpses.
